notes: v0.16.23 — Fix: the first-clear XP/Pulse/keys bonus was paying out on every boss kill instead of only the first one per (boss × difficulty). The mark + save now commits the instant the results overlay appears; a one-shot flag carries the decision through to the bank, then resets, so re-entries find both the mark AND the flag already consumed. New MODULE DROPPED banner on the boss results screen — shows the rarity-colored module you found, or NO MODULE THIS RUN if the roll missed. Hard-guarded to one drop per match. Windows only.
